arts.ttl: Boost for Lazio as Attacker Returns Ahead of Europa League Opener
arts.sum: Lazio have received an important boost as their main striker Taty Castellanos has made his return to training just in time to receive a call-up for their Europa League opener. The Argentine enjoyed a stellar start to the new campaign, grabbing three goals in the first four Serie A rounds.
